evals.prompt: 我的 repo 是 fork 來的，origin 是我的 fork，upstream 是原作者 repo。我要長期維護自己的功能，同時持續同步 upstream，分支怎麼管理比較好？我偏好 squash merge。
evals.expected_output: Recommends master as the integration branch, short-lived feature branches, upstream sync into master, and squash merge for feature completion without introducing develop by default.

evals.prompt: upstream/master 剛更新，我目前有一個正在 review 的 feature branch，最後會 squash merge 回我自己的 master。現在要怎麼同步比較穩？
evals.expected_output: Advises syncing master from upstream first, then merging master into the review branch by default instead of rebasing the review branch immediately.

evals.prompt: 我的 feature branch 還沒開 PR，也還沒分享給別人。上游更新了，我想保持 branch 歷史乾淨，但最後還是會 squash merge。這時候該 merge 還是 rebase？
evals.expected_output: Allows rebase for an unshared private branch, but still frames it around syncing master first and warns that the answer changes once the branch is shared or in review.
